title: mahueeol 2 Tier Countertop Fruit Basket,Portable Fruit Bowle Basket for Kitchen Organizer Storage Fruits Vegetable Bread Snacks, Detachable Metal Rectangle Basket with wood Handle,White
features: 【Multifunctional Storage Rack】A functional helper to neatly store not only your fruits and veggies, but also bread, snacks, spice bottles or toiletries, household items, toys and more. Use it in the kitchen, pantry or bathroom, compact enough to fit on the countertop, dining table .

【2-Tier Fruit Basket】You can use this fruit basket in a stacked 2-tier rack or use it as two separate baskets if preferred. It can hold plenty of various sized fruits, vegetables and bread, keeping your space neat, tidy and organized.
【Portable Wooden Handles】This Fruit Basket Specially designed with portable wooden handles for easy carrying.if you need it for a picnic, family gathering, or camping.

【Easy Installation& Stable Structure】Metal Basket Size: 11.8x 7 x 12.6inches (L x W x H); Made of rustproof wrought iron，stand is very stable and sturdy。it has an attractive design, is a good size and is very sturdy.

Table fruit storage light luxury iron layered rack, is a fruit plate is also a work of art, Modern and stylish design, perfect for kitchen decor。If you have questions , please contact us for immediate assistance.
description: Maheeol fruit basket is portable, cute and practical, and the design of the basket enables the air to circulate and help prevent the fruit from rotting too quickly. Let people easily choose, show, and enjoy all kinds of fresh fruits. It has a wide range of applications in family, gatherings, stores, and other occasions, bringing healthy and delicious enjoyment to people
